content.seo_title: For Freelancers: User Onboarding to Fix Debugging Issues
content.seo_description: Learn how to use automated user onboarding to solve complex debugging issues. An Intermediate guide for freelancers using Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: Debugging often fails because of opaque user inputs and undocumented edge cases. By implementing automated, instrumented user onboarding, you capture precise state data and user intent during the critical first-run experience. This transforms 'can't debug' scenarios into actionable telemetry, allowing you to replicate and resolve errors instantly.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a production stack trace that makes no sense, knowing your client is losing patience by the second. The code isn't just broken; it's a black box, and the lack of visibility into how the user reached this state is turning a simple fix into a multi-day nightmare. You aren't just debugging code; you're debugging a ghost.

But the shift from reactive patching to proactive engineering starts with the onboarding flow. By treating your onboarding as a diagnostic layer rather than just a UI formality, you turn every new user into a data point. With modern AI tools, you can automate this observability, turning your onboarding into a high-fidelity flight recorder that catches errors before they even reach your desk.

steps.title: Architecting the Diagnostic Flow
steps.description: Design an onboarding sequence that captures user state and hardware environment variables before initialization.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a schema for a persistent onboarding state machine that captures browser environment, local storage integrity, and user inputs, ensuring all data is logged to a debugging endpoint.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --instruction 'Generate a state machine for user onboarding that logs all transitions and data to a local JSON file for debugging.'

steps.title: Instrumenting User Inputs
steps.description: Add silent telemetry to your onboarding forms to identify where users are providing unexpected data formats.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a validation wrapper for onboarding forms that captures raw input and the specific validation error if the user triggers a failure during the flow.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add --file src/components/OnboardingForm.tsx --instruction 'Wrap inputs with telemetry that logs state on every change.'

steps.title: Implementing Error Boundary Traps
steps.description: Create specialized error boundaries for the onboarding component to catch and report crashes immediately.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a React Error Boundary component that specifically detects onboarding crashes and serializes the current state into a bug report format.
steps.claude_code_command: claude generate --file src/errors/OnboardingBoundary.tsx --instruction 'Create an error boundary that captures context and logs it to console and external API.'

steps.title: Automating Reproducibility
steps.description: Use Claude Code to create scripts that simulate the user onboarding flow based on the captured logs.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a test script generator that takes a JSON log file from our onboarding flow and converts it into a Playwright test case for automated reproduction.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --instruction 'Create a script that reads onboarding.json logs and generates a Playwright test file.'

steps.title: Closing the Feedback Loop
steps.description: Integrate a 'Report Issue' button directly into the onboarding flow that attaches the diagnostic state.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a frontend component that triggers a diagnostic export of the onboarding state and sends it to our backend monitoring service.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add --file src/components/SupportButton.tsx --instruction 'Add a button that exports onboarding state context to a support ticket API.'

pro_tips: Always log the user's viewport size and network latency during onboarding; these are the two hidden variables that cause 80% of 'unreproducible' bugs.
Use a unique 'Session ID' generated at the start of onboarding to correlate frontend logs with backend API requests.
Never log sensitive PII; implement a sanitization filter in your logging middleware to strip emails and passwords before storage.
Leverage Claude Code to build an automated regression suite that runs your onboarding flow every time a PR is opened.
If an error occurs during onboarding, automatically redirect the user to a 'Help' state that clears their local storage cache to prevent 'stuck' sessions.
content.next_steps: Deploy the onboarding instrumentation to a staging environment, run 5-10 test sessions, and verify that the logs correctly capture edge-case inputs before moving to production.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting fires and start building systems that debug themselves. Elevate your freelance workflow with AI-driven observability and save hours of frustration every single week. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
